steps.t: Digestive roots can be found throughout Tâl Methedras, around the shores of the lake and on the eyot in the middle of the water, at the base of trees.
The grinding stone is at the armour-making pavillion north of Herestan. You now have some digestive roots and need to grind them into powder.
Herestan is to the south of the grinding stone, by the lake's edge, where you left him.
